title: After-Action Report: Keeper Stats, Game Balance & UI Fixes
scope: Fix keeper ERA/awards, field goal physics, playoff balance, quality wins, and UI display issues. The core theme: stats weren't accurately reflecting player impact, and the game engine had variance systems that prevented talent from being a meaningful differentiator.

rationale.item: Keeper ERA showed 0.00 for all keepers across all games despite 600+ coverage snaps
National All-CVL keeper awards went to players with negative WPA and no meaningful stats
90-yard field goals were possible and occasionally made (3-8% success rate)
Playoffs produced excessive upsets — top seeds couldn't win through the bracket
Quality wins in rankings were uncapped and distorted power index
Stats displayed floating point artifacts (e.g. '1477.300000000002 yds')
Field position displayed as raw 1-99 numbers instead of OWN/OPP format

actions.description: Fix keeper ERA: changed _attribute_points_to_keeper() to distribute points equally across all active keepers; added keeper stat fields to fast_sim
Fix keeper awards: added coverage_snaps volume gate; updated stat scoring to 30/35/35 KPR/ERA/WPA blend; Diamond Gloves now uses composite score
Fix field goal physics: rewrote _place_kick_success() with distance tiers, hard 65-yard cap, kick decision refuses >54 yards, stall handler now requires fp>=60
Playoff balance: disabled halo system entirely; increased power ratio exponent 1.8→2.2; tightened contest variance [0.8,2.2]→[0.7,1.7]; reduced playoff composure variance; reduced underdog surge
Fast sim team strength: _team_strength() and _defensive_strength() now compute averages from live player attributes instead of cached team values
Capped quality win score component at 20 points in power index
Fixed field position display: OWN 20 / 50 / OPP 18 format across college/pro/WVL/international templates
Fixed yardage float display: added |round(1) filter to awards template
Post-initial fix: float root cause in _late_down_defensive_clamp returning float; play-by-play integer rounding; removed micro-jitter
10-second clock drain added after all scoring plays

risk_posture: The halo system was completely disabled. This is a significant change that makes individual player quality the primary driver of play outcomes.
The power ratio exponent increase (1.8 → 2.2) combined with variance tightening means talent gaps produce ~26% larger outcome differences per play.

validation_claims.claim: Ran full engine game simulation to verify keeper ERA fix — all 3 keepers per team now receive equal share of points allowed; ERA calculation: (13.0 / 44) * 9 = 2.66 — realistic range
validation_claims.check_method: Run a simulated game and verify 3 keepers each receive ~1/3 of points allowed

non_actions.item: Game analysis text on box score pages doesn't explain the Delta System
non_actions.reason: The 'Game Analysis' block doesn't explain the Delta System. The analysis text is generated by a post-processing script (analyze_game.py) that is no longer present in the repo.

residual_risks: analyze_game.py referenced in changelog is no longer present in the repo; Delta System section explanation is missing from box score pages
open_hooks: When analyze_game.py is restored or rebuilt, the Delta System section should be added with an explanation
section_headers_original: After-Action Report: Keeper Stats, Game Balance & UI Fixes
2. Keeper ERA: Fast Sim Missing Entirely
3. National Keeper Awards: No Volume Gate
unmapped_content: Impact Summary table (before/after): Keeper ERA 0.00→realistic; Diamond Gloves requirement; Field Goals capped at 65yd; Talent Gap 1.78x→2.25x multiplier; Contest Variance [0.8,2.2]→[0.7,1.7]; Playoff Composure +25%→+8%; Quality Wins uncapped→capped at 20; Field Position '82'→'OPP 18'; Yardage '1477.300000000002'→'1477.3'. Notes: Field goal distance changes align with real-world physics (longest recorded NFL field goal is 66 yards). Clock drain set to 10 seconds since viperball has no traditional kickoff. Branch: claude/fix-pro-league-stats-eBU7h.
parser_notes: Root cause analysis section is extensive and detailed. 'Known Remaining Issues' maps to non_actions.
